headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Johnson Controls Intl, Raises Price Target to $144
summary: Barclays  analyst Julian Mitchell   maintains Johnson Controls Intl (NYSE:JCI) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $136 to $144.
